I’m here in February 2016.
It’s rain season. Big shopping mall here, many restaurant’s available. Many travelers came for surfing and kiting.
Beach is dirty. Traffic in this area was bad.
Beach near affordable foods in Kuta. The sunset here is wonderful! By the way, here you can rent sun loungers.
Had a good time at Kuta Beach, lots of surf spots, bars along the beach, coconuts, beer. Beautiful Sunsets. There’s a shopping plaza across the street.

That beach is so beautiful, and if you come in the afternoon to see the sunset, that's a great time. Enjoying the evening view was really beautiful, after that we had dinner and really enjoyed the beauty of Kuta Beach at night too. …
It isn’t the best beach. It was dirty and not so clear, but it is nice for watching sunsets. Attaching some taken by me. Enjoy ?? …
Sunny Kuta beach ?????? always busy with great food and coffee. Always a cold beer at your finger tips. …
Tempat bersih, dari parkiran menuju ke pantai jauh tapi sudah disediakan transportasi. Tempat ikonik di bali
First time in Kuta was 40 years ago.  So sad to see Kuta Beach now, the wide sandy beach has gone due to abrasion.   Too many warung on the beach, look like a slump area

Menikmati sunset di Kuta Beach jangan sampai terlewat. Pantainya bersih dan suasananya nyaman. Pedagang pedagang minuman disana pun ramah ramah dan memberikan harga yang sangat wajar sekali. Sangat rekomen jika ingin menikmati suasana sunset disekitaran Legian dan Kuta
